hooks.prompt: Check LSP diagnostics for the file you just modified. If there are errors, fix them before continuing.

Check for silent scope reduction: did the agent quietly drop, skip, or stub out parts of what was asked WITHOUT flagging it? Return {"decision": "block", "reason": "..."} if the agent silently reduced scope. Exit 0 (no output) if the agent either completed everything or explicitly told the user what it couldn't do and why.

Check collaboration protocol: for any medium/high-stakes decision, did the agent present 2-3 options with tradeoffs? Return {"decision": "block", "reason": "..."} if a non-trivial decision was made without presenting alternatives. Exit 0 if options were presented, only low-stakes decisions were made, or user input was requested.

Before ending: check if significant work was done this session (files modified, decisions made, multi-step tasks in progress). If so, and if .claude/session-handoff.md does not exist or is stale (older than today), suggest: 'Run /ca-session-export to save a handoff for your next session.' Do NOT auto-export — only remind if significant work happened.
